name: Jugram Haschwalth
description:
Jugram is a minor antagonist from the series Bleach. He is a Quincy serving as the acting grandmaster of the Wandenreich army led by Yhwach also given the Schrift, B the "Balance". Prior to joining Yhwach he was a child who befriended Bazzard and upon Yhwach destroying Bazz's village he was convinced to train to kill Yhwach but failed to develop his abilities. It was revealed his innante abilities were empowering Bazz rather than himself. Upon hearing a revelation of his powers he was specially recruited as Yhwach's right hand man and ever since, he helps lead the growing Wandenreich army.

Haschwalth is a tall, young-looking man with a thin build and long blonde hair, which descends past his shoulders, and blonde eyelashes. His usual attire is a variation of the Sternritter's typical white uniform, consisting of the order's signature hooded-cloak, a calf-length trench coat commensurate of his rank with dark green fur running down from his left collar to the front of the coat, a green belt with a golden belt buckle, along with white trousers and shoes.

He possesses unique abilities for a Quincy, rather than manipulating reishi he is only able to impart powers onto others hence his more common means of combat are using a broadsword and bow alongside his Schrift. His ability of the "Balance" distributes misfortune he gains onto others if they also gain fortune during combat. As his innate ability makes him the "other half" to Yhwach, he's able to tap into the Almighty ability and glimpse into the future but not alter it like Yhwach can.
creator: AnimeMan1993
